message:
chore: Update documentation and configuration

Update project documentation, workflows, and configuration files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ Spawn, manage, and coordinate Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and Google Gemini CLI a
```bash -curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_commands/main/add_useful_tmux_commands_to_zshrc.sh | bash +curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_commands/main/add_useful_tmux_commands_to_zshrc.sh?$(date +%s)" | bash ```
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_comma Install everything automatically—tmux, fzf, configs, and keybindings—with a single command: ```bash -curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_commands/main/add_useful_tmux_commands_to_zshrc.sh | bash -s -- --easy +curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_commands/main/add_useful_tmux_commands_to_zshrc.sh?$(date +%s)" | bash -s -- --easy ``` Easy mode automatically: @@ -177,7 +177,7 @@ znt myproject 3 # Zoom to pane index 3 ### One-Line Install (Recommended) ```bash -curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_commands/main/add_useful_tmux_commands_to_zshrc.sh | bash +curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_commands/main/add_useful_tmux_commands_to_zshrc.sh?$(date +%s)" | bash ``` Then reload your shell: @@ -224,7 +224,7 @@ source ~/.zshrc Or re-run the install script with the uninstall flag: ```bash -curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_commands/main/add_useful_tmux_commands_to_zshrc.sh | bash -s -- --uninstall +curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/useful_tmux_commands/main/add_useful_tmux_commands_to_zshrc.sh?$(date +%s)" | bash -s -- --uninstall ``` ---
